title: “Disclose & Dispose”: Stricter Accounting Requirements to Push Up NPLs Further
dek: Tighter recognition standards are expected to reveal more NPLs and encourage faster balance-sheet cleanup.

sections.heading: Issue overview
paragraphs: This issue addresses stricter accounting and disclosure requirements under the theme “Disclose & Dispose,” explaining why more rigorous recognition of credit stress can push reported nonperforming loans higher.

The central implication is that greater transparency does not eliminate credit risk; rather, it can bring latent problem assets into view and accelerate the need for disposal, restructuring, and balance-sheet clean-up.

For investors focused on distressed and special-situations credit, the resulting increase in recognized NPL supply can expand the opportunity set for disciplined acquisition, servicing, and resolution strategies.
